bird.name: White-backed vulture
bird.summary: The white-backed vulture (Gyps africanus) is an Old World vulture in the family Accipitridae, which also includes eagles, kites, buzzards a…

relations.evidence: Retrieved February 23, 2018, from http://onlinelibrary.wiley.com/doi/10.1111/j.1474-919X.2008.00878.x/full A contributing factor are broader changes in vegetation composition, such as woody plant encroachment, which can decrease hunting efficiency due to limited visibility.{{Cite journal |last=Malan |first=G
